summary: Comprehensive testing of DE/EN translation system for EuroAdria Investment Platform. All translation features working correctly across all pages. Language toggle switches all visible text. No TranslatePage wrapper used (no slow DOM translation). No broken spacing or concatenated words found.

ui_bugs.issue: Route is /investment/rechner not /investment/roi-calculator as mentioned in test request

language_toggle_desktop.description: Globe icon button with data-testid='language-toggle-desktop' toggles between EN/DE correctly

items: TrustBar: 'Your direct line to the office'
Section: 'Why the Balkans instead of the EU?'
Subtitle: 'Privileged access to Serbia's economic elite'

roi_calculator_translation.note: Uses <T> component with synchronous dictionary lookup

cookie_banner_translation.description: Cookie banner shows German by default ('Cookie-Einstellungen', 'Alle akzeptieren') and translates to English when language is switched

trustbar_translation.description: TrustBar translates without missing spaces: 'Referenced in n-tv, RTL, Focus, VC Magazin & Kosmo' and 'Your direct line to the office'

footer_translation.description: Footer links translate: 'Legal', 'Imprint', 'Privacy Policy', 'Terms & Conditions', 'About Us', 'Contact'

language_persistence.description: Language toggle switches back to German correctly, showing 'Firmengründung', 'IMMOBILIENANGEBOT'

translation_architecture.static_ui_text: JSON files at /app/frontend/src/i18n/de.json and en.json via t() function
translation_architecture.page_specific_text: Inline lang === 'en' ternaries for page-specific static text
translation_architecture.t_component: Synchronous <T> component with hardcoded dictionary (no API calls) for ROI Calculator
translation_architecture.no_TranslatePage_wrapper: Confirmed - no slow DOM translation used

context_for_next_testing_agent: Translation system fully working. All pages use lang === 'en' ternaries or t() function for static text. ROI Calculator uses <T> component with synchronous dictionary. No TranslatePage wrapper used anywhere. ROI Calculator route is /investment/rechner (not /investment/roi-calculator).
